title: Turkish Lamb Kebap
description: A traditional Turkish dish featuring marinated lamb kebap grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Turkish Adana Kebap Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine lamb, Turkish Adana Kebap Spice Mix, and 1 tablespoon olive oil. Mix well to coat lamb cubes.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Remove lamb from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Grill lamb cubes for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
6. Transfer lamb to a serving platter or individual plates.
7. Grill rye bread slices for 1-2 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
8. Serve lamb with grilled rye bread and a drizzle of robust red vinegar (if desired).
